text: Cats sleep 12–16 hours a day — they're professional nappers! 😴
A cat's purr vibrates between 25–150 Hz, which can actually help heal bones! 🌀
Cats can't taste sweetness — they're missing the sweet taste receptor gene. 🚫🍬
A group of cats is called a 'clowder.' Sounds very fancy! 🎩
Cats can jump up to 6 times their body length in a single leap! 🚀
A cat's nose print is as unique as a human fingerprint! 🐾
Indoor cats can live 15–20 years. That's a lot of nap cycles! 🎂
Cats spend 30–50% of waking hours grooming themselves. Total hygiene royalty! 💅
The oldest cat ever, Creme Puff, lived to 38 years old! 👑
Cats have 32 muscles in each ear and can rotate them 180°! 👂
Cats can run at up to 30 mph in short bursts — faster than most humans! 🏃
Cats see blues and yellows well but reds appear muted. Night vision is their superpower! 👁️
Cat coat colors include black, white, orange, gray, cream, and patterns like tabby, calico, and tortoiseshell! 🎨
Aggressive cats show dilated pupils, flattened ears, and a puffed tail before attacking. Territorial behavior varies by breed! 😠
Orange/ginger cats are rated the most annoying and demanding by owners in surveys! They meow more, knock things over, and crave constant attention. Calico cats are a close second for feistiness! 🟠😾
Whiskers match a cat's body width and detect air currents — precision navigation sensors even in total darkness! 📡
Cats are obligate carnivores — they MUST eat meat to survive. Their bodies can't produce taurine on their own! 🥩
Cats have a 'righting reflex' — they instinctively rotate mid-fall to land on their feet every time! 🤸
Adult cats almost never meow at each other — meowing is a language they developed specifically to talk to humans! 🗣️
Catnip triggers euphoria lasting ~10 minutes. Cats need a 30-min cooldown before it works again! 🌿
Ragdolls, Persians, and Maine Coons are the friendliest cat breeds. Siamese tend to be the most vocal! 🐈
Breeds like Siamese, Sphynx, and Bengal can be more territorial. Orange cats often rank higher in aggression surveys! 😾
Cats were domesticated ~10,000 years ago in the Near East. Ancient Egyptians worshipped them as sacred animals! 🏺
Cats knead because it's a leftover kitten behavior — kittens knead their mama to stimulate milk flow! 🐾
A cat's tail is a mood flag! Upright = happy. Puffed = scared. Low flick = irritated. Slow sway = hunting mode! 🚩
